dimensions.note: Credential resolution stays delegated to the AWS SDK (fromIni/ambient) via the aws_credentials twin; no secrets vaulted or logged. This slice replaces the inline preflightSso wiring with the shared preflightSsoGate — the gate resolves the cached SSO token through the same injectable resolver and surfaces only the remediation message (no token bytes). The known credentialModeField 'looks like a secret' WARN is the documented false positive (an enum of 'profile'/'env', not a secret).

The two pre-flight warn messages (expired: 'SSO pre-flight failed for session {session}: {message}'; network: proceed-with-sweep) moved verbatim into the shared gate and are asserted byte-for-byte by the canonical _lib/aws_credentials_test.ts capturing-logger tests. The caller keeps its own completion info log on the abort path, so the operator still sees the 'default-sg-audit complete' summary with counts. Structured placeholders throughout; no credential values logged.

Policy unchanged, now owned by the gate: only an expired token aborts (one actionable scan_error spreading the canonical {service:'sso', phase:'preflight_sso', kind:'auth_expired', message: ssoRemediation} fragment); a network blip warns and proceeds; empty ssoSession skips the check inside the gate (the caller-side length guard was absorbed). Per-(profile,region) failures still degrade to scan_error rows. Verified by the existing runScan sso short-circuit / network-proceed / no-session unit tests, which pass unchanged.

The four runScan pre-flight tests (expired short-circuit, healthy proceed, network proceed, no-session no-op) pass unchanged against the gate — behavior is pinned at the caller level. The triplicated resolveBootstrapRegion suite was deleted from tests/ because the function moved to the canonical _lib; its full chain (first-region, AWS_REGION, AWS_DEFAULT_REGION, us-east-1 fallback, whitespace-unset) is now covered once in _lib/aws_credentials_test.ts, which the repo gate runs.

Scan remains read-only (Describe* + GetCallerIdentity) and re-runnable; deterministic keys unchanged. The gate is resolve-only, and an empty ssoSession preserves prior behavior exactly (now enforced inside the gate rather than at the call site).

No AWS request/response mapping changed; SHARED_RETRY (adaptive, maxAttempts 3) still spread into the EC2/STS clients; SDK pins unchanged at 3.1073.0. resolveBootstrapRegion moved verbatim into the twin (same candidate order, trim semantics, us-east-1 fallback), so the bootstrap sts/ec2 calls target the same region as before.
No new clients, handles, or files. The gate opens no SDK client (token resolution delegated to the injected resolver / shared-ini loader). Existing per-client cleanup paths untouched.

Manifest and model.version aligned at 2026.07.03.0. README unchanged (it documents behavior, not the internal preflight wiring, and the behavior is identical). The public API no longer exports resolveBootstrapRegion from the entrypoint (it now lives in the generated _lib twin); no README example referenced it. Test fixtures keep placeholder identifiers.

MECHANICAL Schema-Write Conformance re-verified at the changed call site: the abort-path writeError spreads the typed PreflightSsoErrorFragment (service/phase/kind literals + message) over the row prefix {profile:'', accountId:'', region:''} and appends scannedAt — all 8 ScanErrorSchema fields present, none extra, kind is the literal 'auth_expired' which narrows into the z.enum. Schemas remain strict z.object, no passthrough.
finding/scan_error keep lifetime 'infinite' and garbageCollection 10 — unchanged.
Read-only fan-out audit, not a CRUD lifecycle model. Unchanged by this slice.

The SSO pre-flight is still opt-in (ssoSession non-empty) and runs once before the per-profile loop; the resolver seam (deps.resolveSsoToken) is preserved through the gate so tests drive expired/ok/network without disk or SDK. requiredProfileSuffix refusal still fires before any AWS call.

MECHANICAL: key construction unchanged — scan_error keyed by canonical scanErrorKey(profile, region, service, phase); the preflight row keys identically to before (same empty prefix + sso/preflight_sso). findingKey unchanged and collision-free across (account, region, sg).
writeResource-only producer; no readResource paths changed. Downstream report contract (finding/scan_error rows) byte-identical in shape.

model.version bumped 2026.06.26.1 -> 2026.07.03.0 with a matching no-op upgrade entry appended (identity upgradeAttributes; description notes the centralized pre-flight, no globalArguments schema changes). Chain tail equals model.version, verified by the colocated manifest-sync test.
